stemHtml:
In contact with a radar Air Traffic Services unit, an aircraft receives the three following messages (call signs are omitted). Which option lists correct responses to all of these messages?

1. "Advise type of transponder capability"
2. "Check altimeter setting and confirm level"
3. "Turn left immediately heading 050 to avoid traffic 12 o’clock 3 miles"

options.a: 1. Transponder Bravo, 2. Altimeter 1008 altitude 2000 ft, 3. Left immediately heading 050
options.b: 1. Transponder Alpha, 2. Altimeter 1008 flight level 110, 3. Left immediately 050
options.c: 1. Transponder Charlie, 2. Altimeter 1008 flight level 110, 3. Left immediately 050
options.d: 1. Transponder Sierra, 2. Altimeter 1008 altitude 2000 ft, 3. Left heading 050
